title: DSS Choker
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] DSS Choker             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Nov 24, 2012 2:46 am [Split from Wunder thread. Struck-out text = not Germane to new thread.] If I understand it correctly the collar was the reason for Shinji's zero synch rating, yes? [s]So if he's on the ship without one and it is indeed powered by 01, might some wild shenanigans ensue?[/s]

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sat Nov 24, 2012 2:54 am NemZ wrote: If I understand it correctly the collar was the reason for Shinji's zero synch rating, yes? So if he's on the ship without one and it is indeed powered by 01, might some wild shenanigans ensue?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 24, 2012 3:08 am Shinoyami65 wrote: It doesn't actually affect a person's ability to synch with an Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Nov 24, 2012 3:44 am Reichu wrote: It's highly implied to have a synch-killing function.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 24, 2012 4:08 am LiLi wrote: Where? Could you point me to the scene please?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 24, 2012 4:31 am There was a screen that described the DSS Collar, I can't remember what the acronym stood for, but I remember the "D" was an unusual word. Right afterwards (or was it right before?), they showed a sync display and some numbers were flying by before it concluded the sync rate was 0%. I don't know if anything was said specifically or not, but I just assumed it was connected.

[]:             Quote Post by xenosaga » Sat Nov 24, 2012 5:01 am Sync thing seems interesting......I have question about the collar. 1. If I understand correctly Kaworu puts on the collar instead of Shinji? Is it just easy to take on/off? Kinda weird since I would assume Will-E would have made the collar not removable so Shinji can't take off the collar. 2. Does collar have any sort of tracking/identifying system? From what I read Misato sees Angel sign show up before she triggers? 3. And do we actually see Misato pulling the trigger when the collar explodes?

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Nov 24, 2012 5:36 am IIRC, DSS = Deification Shutdown System

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 24, 2012 5:56 am If they're so worried about deification, they should put one of the things on Eva-01... :p

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jan 12, 2013 11:44 pm Reichu wrote: If they're so worried about deification, they should put one of the things on Eva-01... :p

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 12, 2013 11:56 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Yes, but Anno would then proceed to lose money from lack of future Evangelion movies. This is impossible.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:33 am Killing things by decapitation seems to be a common theme in EoTV. Of note are Unit-02's death, Kaworu's death, Kyoko's death, the death of Asuka's doll, and Gendo's induction. The DSS appears to be simply playing off of this general theme.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:40 am xenosaga wrote: Sync thing seems interesting......I have question about the collar. 1. If I understand correctly Kaworu puts on the collar instead of Shinji? Is it just easy to take on/off? Kinda weird since I would assume Will-E would have made the collar not removable so Shinji can't take off the collar. 2. Does collar have any sort of tracking/identifying system? From what I read Misato sees Angel sign show up before she triggers? 3. And do we actually see Misato pulling the trigger when the collar explodes?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:41 am I believe the collar exploded due to the recognition of a pattern blue type.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:53 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Killing things by decapitation seems to be a common theme in EoTV.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:56 am Reichu wrote: EoTV is "End of TV (Series)", i.e., the original episodes 25 and 26.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:08 am Reichu wrote: If they're so worried about deification, they should put one of the things on Eva-01... :p

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:57 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Whoops! My bad there. As to your quote about the collar delay, just remember that Anno needs more cash. Constantly. I think he eats the stuff for breakfast.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jan 13, 2013 8:53 am Darkwing wrote: It's the diamond ponies he buys his wife. Their not statues either. Their real living horses made out of diamonds.

[]:             Quote Post by Mbryo » Sun Jan 13, 2013 9:47 am Reichu wrote: If they're so worried about deification, they should put one of the things on Eva-01... :p
